instruction: Move all emails whose subject contains "newsletter" from Inbox to Archive.
reference_command: all=$(for p in {1..50}; do out=$(himalaya envelope list --folder Inbox --page "$p" --page-size 100 -o json 2>/dev/null || true); [ -z "$out" ] && break; [ "$out" = "[]" ] && break; echo "$out"; done); if [ -z "$all" ]; then exit 0; fi; printf '%s\n' "$all" | jq -s -r '"newsletter" as $kw | add | [ .[] | select(((.subject // "") | ascii_downcase) | contains(($kw|ascii_downcase))) | .id ] | unique | .[]' | while IFS= read -r id; do [ -n "$id" ] || continue; himalaya message move --folder Inbox Archive "$id"; done
